retry_reason: refcount_inc always succeeds and does not return an error; if the precondition (refcount > 0) is violated, retrying would not fix the underlying bug.
contract_summary: Acquires a reference on a btrfs_io_context object by incrementing its refcount. The caller must ensure the object is already live (refcount > 0) before calling; a WARN_ON is used to catch violations. After this call, the caller holds an additional reference and must eventually release it with a corresponding put (e.g., btrfs_put_bioc). The function does not transfer ownership—it shares it.
